channel.title: Anil Turaga's Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Anil Turaga's Blog

item.title: Search Engine's Blind Spot: Continuity and Context
item.description: Nearly 35 years has passed from the advent of search engines. Google search experience has been relatively stagnant for a long time barring the recent AI Overviews feature. Search offerings can be broadly bifurcated into two types: Wall of blue links Chat interface that reads sites for you Personal preference: I would rather be presented with a list of curated excerpts from different sites based on my query. AI can be used to select appropriate sections of each site and present them as is in a list of iframes.
